prestazioni: 3.2L V6 JTS (937.A5) engine with a custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler (front-mount, 600x300x100mm core) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by Supersprint (catless downpipe, 76mm piping, dual 100mm titanium tips). Supporting mods include a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, and a custom ECU remap by Autodelta (Stage 3+ tune with 450+ HP target on 98 RON fuel).

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (BRERA-specific valving, 2-way adjustable dampers) with Eibach Pro-Kit helper springs (25% stiffer than OEM) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (full chassis refresh: front control arms, rear subframe, and anti-roll bar mounts). Front and rear strut braces by Cusco (Type-RS, 22mm diameter) and a Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, 3-position).

Brembo GT 6-piston front brake kit (380mm two-piece rotors, Type-4 pads) with Ferodo Racing DS2500 pads and Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines. Rear brakes upgraded to Brembo 4-piston calipers (345mm rotors) with Motul RBF 660 brake fluid. Lightweight 19-inch OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (8.5J front, 9.5J rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40 R19 front, 275/35 R19 rear).
estetica: Custom widebody conversion kit by Novitec (Alfa Romeo Brera-specific, carbon fiber front fenders with 30mm extended flares, rear quarter panels with 40mm extensions, and a carbon fiber rear diffuser). Front bumper lip spoiler by Zender (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with integrated LED fog lights).

Full carbon fiber exterior package by Capristo (hood with dual heat extractors, trunk lid, side skirts, and mirror covers). Rear wing by APR Performance (GT-250 model, 3D carbon fiber, adjustable angle, 1,200mm span). Custom paint in Alfa Rosso Competizione with matte black accents (PPG Deltron DBC basecoat, 20-layer clearcoat).

Interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (Alcantara/leather, carbon fiber backs, 6-point Schroth harnesses). Custom roll cage by Safety Devices (6-point, TIG-welded, bolt-in design with integrated harness bar). MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release hub) and a custom center console by Varis (carbon fiber, integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display).
